## What does this change?

A clear, short description of the change. Reference the issue if there is one (`Fixes #N`).

## Why?

The motivation. What was wrong / missing / improvable.

## Type of change

- [ ] Schema improvement (`CLAUDE.md` workflow)
- [ ] New / improved note template (`Atlas 🧠/_System/templates/`)
- [ ] New / improved worked example (`Atlas 🧠/_System/misc/`)
- [ ] New generic concept or entity page
- [ ] Documentation (README, SETUP, CONTRIBUTING, System Reference)
- [ ] Bug fix (broken wikilink, stale reference, typo)
- [ ] Repo hygiene (`.gitignore`, `.github/`, `LICENSE`, `.obsidian/` minimal config)

## Checks

- [ ] Opened the vault in Obsidian, ran `lint the vault` — zero broken wikilinks
- [ ] No personal data introduced (no real names, ventures, clients, or project tags)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` if this is user-visible
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `SETUP.md` if I changed something that affects setup or onboarding
- [ ] No copyrighted source content included

## Anything else?

Screenshots (graph view, lint output), trade-offs considered, follow-up work that's NOT in this PR.
